questions.question:
A sequential circuit using D flip-flop and logic gates is shown in Figure, where \( X \) and \( Y \) are the inputs and \( Z \) is the output. The circuit is



Digital Logic: NIELIT 2017 OCT Scientific Assistant A (CS)
options: \( \text{S-R} \) Flip-flop with inputs \( X = R \) and \( Y=S \)
\( \text{S-R} \) Flip-flop with inputs \( X = S \) and \( Y=R \)
\( \text{J-K} \) Flip-flop with inputs \( X = J \) and \( Y=K \)
\( \text{J-K} \) Flip-flop with inputs \( X = K \) and \( Y=J \)
questions.correct_answer: \( \text{J-K} \) Flip-flop with inputs \( X = K \) and \( Y=J \)

questions.question:
The number of columns in a state table for a sequential circuit with \( ’m’ \) flip flops and \( ’n’ \) input is



Digital Logic: NIELIT 2017 OCT Scientific Assistant A (IT)

Consider a combination of \( \text{T} \) and \( \text{D} \) flip-flops connected as shown below. The output of the \( \text{D} \) flipflop is connected to the input of the \( \text{T} \) flip-flop and the output of the \( \text{T} \) flip-flop is connected to the input of the \( \text{D} \) flip-flop.

Initially, both \( \text{Q}_{0} \) and \( \text{Q}_{1} \) are set to \( 1 \) (before the \( 1{\text{st}} \) clock cycle). The outputs ________



Digital Logic: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 94
options: \( \text{Q}_{1}\text{Q}_{0} \) after the \( 3^{\text{rd}} \) cycle are \( 11 \) and after the \( 4^{\text{th}} \) cycle are \( 00 \) respectively
\( \text{Q}_{1}\text{Q}_{0} \) after the \( 3^{\text{rd}} \) cycle are \( 11 \) and after the \( 4^{\text{th}} \) cycle are \( 01 \) respectively
\( \text{Q}_{1}\text{Q}_{0} \) after the \( 3^{\text{rd}} \) cycle are \( 00 \) and after the \( 4^{\text{th}} \) cycle are \( 11 \) respectively
\( \text{Q}_{1}\text{Q}_{0} \) after the \( 3^{\text{rd}} \) cycle are \( 01 \) and after the \( 4^{\text{th}} \) cycle are \( 01 \) respectively
questions.correct_answer: \( \text{Q}_{1}\text{Q}_{0} \) after the \( 3^{\text{rd}} \) cycle are \( 11 \) and after the \( 4^{\text{th}} \) cycle are \( 01 \) respectively
